title: Dedicated video, 50K to 100K subscribers
text: industry benchmark range 500 to 3000 USD for a dedicated video at 50K to 100K subscribers
source: Creator OS handoff market-analysis reference; verify against current data before quoting

title: By format, 50K to 100K subscribers
text: industry benchmark range 200 to 5000 USD at the same subscriber tier depending on format
source: Creator OS handoff market-analysis reference; verify against current data before quoting
